input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.1.1
            TITLE: nonconductive material or covers must prevent inadvertent human contact with any tractive

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.1.1: Nonconductive material or covers must prevent inadvertent human contact with any Tractive
EV.6.1.1 Nonconductive material or covers must prevent inadvertent human contact with any Tractive 
System voltage.  
Covers must be secure and sufficiently rigid.   
Removable Bodywork is not suitable to enclose Tractive System connections.

final_answer: Nonconductive material or covers must prevent inadvertent human contact with any Tractive System voltage. Covers must be secure and sufficiently rigid. Removable Bodywork is not suitable to enclose Tractive System connections.
